tasks.instruction: Make the home icon red (#e63946). Don't touch its path geometry.
Make the heart icon blue (#3b82f6). Don't touch its path geometry.
Make the star icon green (#22c55e). Don't touch its path geometry.
Make the sun icon yellow (#fde047). Don't touch its path geometry.

Make the cloud icon orange (#f97316). Don't touch its path geometry.
Make the fire icon pink (#ec4899). Don't touch its path geometry.

Make the shopping-cart icon green (#22c55e). Don't touch its path geometry.

Make the map-pin icon yellow (#fde047). Don't touch its path geometry.
Make the globe-alt icon purple (#a855f7). Don't touch its path geometry.
Make the document icon orange (#f97316). Don't touch its path geometry.
Set the stroke-width of the folder icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the bookmark icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the trash icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the key icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the lock-closed icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the eye icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the check icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the x-mark icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the plus icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the minus icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the chart-bar icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the chart-pie icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the clock icon to exactly 2.5.
Set the stroke-width of the calendar icon to exactly 1.
Set the stroke-width of the face-smile icon to exactly 2.5.
Make the light-bulb icon 40% smaller (scale factor 0.6× around its center).
Make the gift icon 40% larger (scale factor 1.4× around its center).
Make the tag icon 40% smaller (scale factor 0.6× around its center).
Make the flag icon 40% larger (scale factor 1.4× around its center).
Make the truck icon 40% smaller (scale factor 0.6× around its center).
Make the beaker icon 40% larger (scale factor 1.4× around its center).
Make the photo icon 40% smaller (scale factor 0.6× around its center).
Make the home icon 40% larger (scale factor 1.4× around its center).
Make the heart icon 40% smaller (scale factor 0.6× around its center).
Make the star icon 40% larger (scale factor 1.4× around its center).
Shift the users icon 12px to the right (update x and y exactly).
Shift the camera icon 12px to the left (update x and y exactly).
Shift the phone icon 12px to the up (update x and y exactly).
Shift the microphone icon 12px to the down (update x and y exactly).
Shift the magnifying-glass icon 8px to the right (update x and y exactly).
Add an unread-notification badge: a red circle at cx=100, cy=28, r=6, fill #e63946.
Add an unread badge on the envelope: red circle cx=100, cy=28, r=5, fill #e63946.
Add a red center dot on the clock face: circle cx=64, cy=64, r=2, fill #e63946.
Add a green status dot on the folder: circle cx=96, cy=56, r=3, fill #22c55e.
Mark the user as online: green circle cx=88, cy=96, r=4, fill #22c55e.
Add a soft highlight on the heart: white semi-transparent circle cx=50, cy=50, r=3, opacity 0.6.
Add a yellow center on the star: circle cx=64, cy=64, r=2, fill #fde047.
Underline the check: line from (24,100) to (104,100), stroke #22c55e, stroke-width 2.
Underline the x-mark: line from (24,100) to (104,100), stroke #e63946, stroke-width 2.
Add a ground shadow under the pin: ellipse cx=64, cy=116, rx=14, ry=2, fill #0006.
Three icons sit in a row: home, heart, star. Recolor ONLY the home icon red (#e63946). The other two stay black (#222).

Add the unread badge on the bell: red circle cx=100, cy=28, r=6, fill #e63946.
Add an unread badge on the envelope: red circle cx=100, cy=28, r=5, fill #e63946.
Wrap the check in a green ring: circle cx=64, cy=64, r=36, fill none, stroke #22c55e, stroke-width 2.
Wrap the x-mark in a red ring: circle cx=64, cy=64, r=36, fill none, stroke #e63946, stroke-width 2.
Mark the user as online: a green circle cx=92, cy=92, r=5, fill #22c55e, with a white 1px stroke.
Add a small sparkle on top of the star: polyline from (64,12) to (60,4) to (68,4), stroke #fde047, stroke-width 2, no fill.
Add an extra sun ray at the top: line (64,0)→(64,8), stroke #f97316, stroke-width 2.
Add a green status dot on the folder: circle cx=100, cy=60, r=3, fill #22c55e.
Add a red pivot on the clock: circle cx=64, cy=64, r=2, fill #e63946.
Add a ground shadow under the pin: ellipse cx=64, cy=116, rx=14, ry=2, fill #0006.
Add a shine highlight on the heart: white semi-transparent circle cx=50, cy=48, r=3, opacity 0.7.
Hint the lock can be opened: yellow line (50,70)→(78,70), stroke #fde047, stroke-width 2.
Add a yellow bow knot on top of the gift: circle cx=64, cy=36, r=3, fill #fde047.
Add a yellow ball on the flag's pole tip: circle cx=28, cy=22, r=3, fill #fde047.
Add a yellow spark next to the fire: circle cx=80, cy=28, r=2, fill #fde047.
Someone added an unread badge to this bell by mistake. Remove the red circle at cx=100, cy=28.
Remove the stray red rectangle (x=96, y=56, 6x6) from the folder.
Remove the stray diagonal line crossing the heart (the line from 24,24 to 104,104).
Remove the red crossing line over the check (line from 20,20 to 100,100).
Remove the extra red dot in the center of the star (circle cx=64, cy=64, r=4).
Remove the stray blue square (x=80, y=80, 12x12) from the user icon.
Remove the unread badge on the envelope (red circle cx=100, cy=28, r=5).
Remove the stray gray ellipse (cx=96, cy=96, rx=14, ry=6) covering the sun.
Remove the stray red arrow line from (0,0) to (64,64).
Remove the extra window (blue rect x=80, y=60, 10x10) — this house only has one window.
Shift the home icon 6px right (update x by 6, y by 0).
Shift the heart icon 6px left (update x by -6, y by 0).
Shift the star icon 6px up (update x by 0, y by -6).
Shift the bell icon 6px down (update x by 0, y by 6).
Shift the user icon 8px right (update x by 8, y by 0).
Shift the envelope icon 8px left (update x by -8, y by 0).
Shift the cog icon 8px down (update x by 0, y by 8).
Shift the folder icon 8px up (update x by 0, y by -8).
Shift the sun icon 4px up and to the right (update x by 4, y by -4).
Shift the moon icon 4px down and to the left (update x by -4, y by 4).
Five icons in a row (home, heart, star, sun). Recolor ONLY the first one (home) red (#e63946); the others stay #222.
Five icons in a row (bell, envelope, phone, microphone, cog). Recolor ONLY the second one (envelope) blue (#3b82f6); the others stay #222.

[house scene] Make only the door blue (#3b82f6). The home outline + window + chimney must remain untouched.
[house scene] Make only the window yellow (#fde047). Everything else stays the same.
[house scene] Make only the chimney green (#22c55e). Don't touch the home, door, window, or doorknob.
[clock scene] Recolor only the hour-hand red (#e63946) by changing its stroke. Minute-hand + pivot + clock outline unchanged.
[envelope scene] Make only the stamp green (#22c55e). Envelope outline, address, urgent dot unchanged.
[envelope scene] Make only the urgent dot yellow (#fde047). Other parts unchanged.
[bell scene] Make only the notification badge blue (#3b82f6). Bell outline, ringer, badge-count unchanged.
[face scene] Make only the left blush red (#e63946). Right blush stays pink, face stays black.
[cart scene] Make only item-1 (the rectangle inside the cart) green (#22c55e). Item-2 + base cart + wheels unchanged.
[pin scene] Make only the pin-dot blue (#3b82f6). Map-pin outline + shadow unchanged.
[gift scene] Make only the bow-knot blue (#3b82f6). Bows + gift outline unchanged.
[flag scene] Make only the pole-tip red (#e63946). Flag outline + windline unchanged.
[bulb scene] Make only the halo around the bulb blue (#3b82f6). Filament + bulb outline unchanged.
[cog scene] Make only the center-dot blue (#3b82f6). Cog outline + rotation-arrow unchanged.
[heart scene] Make only the crack line red (#e63946). Heart outline + arrow unchanged.
[house scene] Nudge the door 4px to the right (x: 56→60). Nothing else moves.
[house scene] Move the window to the right side of the wall: shift x by +30 (32→62). Other parts unchanged.
[house scene] Remove the doorknob (the tiny yellow circle at cx=70, cy=94, r=1.5). Everything else stays.
[clock scene] Set the minute hand to 9 o'clock: shift x2 by -24 (88→64). Hour-hand and pivot unchanged.
[clock scene] Rotate the hour hand to point down at 6: shift y2 by +26 (38→64). Minute-hand and pivot unchanged.
[envelope scene] Move the stamp from the right side to the left side: shift x by -56 (92→36). Other parts unchanged.
[face scene] Wipe the tear: remove the tear-left polyline. Blushes + face unchanged.
[face scene] Add a symmetric right tear: polyline (84,72)→(82,84)→(86,84), stroke #3b82f6, stroke-width 2, no fill.
[cart scene] Remove item-2 (the yellow circle cx=80, cy=65, r=5) from the cart. Item-1, wheels, base cart unchanged.
[cart scene] Add a third item: green rect x=68, y=60, 10×10, fill #22c55e.
[pin scene] Remove the ground shadow (ellipse cx=64, cy=112, rx=18, ry=3). Pin + dot unchanged.
[bell scene] Remove the small white dot inside the badge (badge-count). Badge + bell + ringer unchanged.
[bulb scene] Remove the yellow halo around the bulb. Filament + bulb outline unchanged.
[heart scene] Pull out the arrow: remove the arrow line. Crack + heart outline unchanged.
[cog scene] Remove the rotation-arrow polyline. Cog outline + center-dot unchanged.
[house scene] The door has slipped 20px to the left of the wall. Slide it back into place (x: 36→56). Wall + window + chimney unchanged.
[house scene] The window is 20px off to the right. Slide it back to its proper position (x: 52→32).
[clock scene] The minute hand has rotated up off the clock face. Restore it to 3 o'clock (y2: 44→64, x2: stays at 88).
[envelope scene] The stamp drifted down-right. Move it back to x=92, y=32.
[face scene] The right blush floated up. Move it back to cy=70 (currently cy=50).
[cart scene] The left wheel rolled left. Restore it under the cart (cx: 36→52).
[cart scene] The right wheel rolled right. Restore it under the cart (cx: 108→92).
[pin scene] The pin-dot slid down off the head of the pin. Move it back up (cy: 64→46).
[bell scene] The badge fell down off the bell. Restore it to cx=92, cy=28.
[gift scene] The bow-knot shifted right. Restore it to cx=64 (currently cx=88).
[house scene] Make ONLY the door blue (#3b82f6). The home outline, window, chimney, doorknob must remain pixel-identical.
[house scene] Make ONLY the window yellow (#fde047). Door, chimney, doorknob, home outline unchanged.
[house scene] Shrink ONLY the chimney to 60% of its original size (around its own center). Door, window, doorknob, home outline unchanged.
[clock scene] Point ONLY the minute hand straight UP at 12 (shift its y2 by -24, from 64 to 40). Hour-hand + pivot + clock outline unchanged.
[clock scene] Point ONLY the hour hand toward 4:30 (shift x2 by +26, y2 by +26). Minute-hand + pivot + clock outline unchanged.
[envelope scene] Enlarge ONLY the stamp by 25% (around its own center). Urgent, address, envelope outline unchanged.
[bell scene] Repaint ONLY the badge blue (#3b82f6). Bell outline, ringer, badge-count unchanged.
[face scene] Repaint ONLY the left blush purple (#a855f7). Right blush + tear + face unchanged.
[face scene] Repaint ONLY the tear-left green (#22c55e) — change its stroke. Blushes + face unchanged.
[cart scene] Enlarge ONLY item-1 (the rectangle inside the cart) by 50%. Item-2, wheels, base cart unchanged.
[pin scene] Enlarge ONLY the pin-dot by 50% (around its own center). Shadow + map-pin outline unchanged.
[gift scene] Repaint ONLY the bow-knot blue (#3b82f6). Both bow circles + gift outline unchanged.
[flag scene] Repaint ONLY the windline green (#22c55e) — change its stroke. Pole-tip + flag outline unchanged.
[bulb scene] Enlarge ONLY the halo by 30% (around its own center). Filament + bulb outline unchanged.
[cog scene] Repaint ONLY the center-dot green (#22c55e). Rotation-arrow + cog outline unchanged.
[house scene] The door has slipped 16px to the left (x is now 40). Slide it back to x=56. Other parts pixel-identical.
[house scene] The window is 16px too far right (x=48). Move it back to x=32.
[house scene] The chimney sank 14px (y=40). Raise it back to y=26.
[house scene] The doorknob slipped 6px left (cx=64). Restore it to cx=70.
[clock scene] The hour-hand tip has drifted right (x2=76). Restore it to x2=64.
[clock scene] The minute-hand tip dropped (y2=78). Restore it to y2=64.
[clock scene] The pivot is off-center (cx=68, cy=68). Restore it to cx=64, cy=64.
[envelope scene] The stamp slid down (y=42). Move it back to y=32.
[envelope scene] The urgent dot drifted right (cx=110). Restore it to cx=100.
[bell scene] The ringer is off-center (cx=56). Restore it to cx=64.
[bell scene] The badge slipped down-left (cx=82, cy=34). Restore it to cx=92, cy=28.
[face scene] The left blush slid right (cx=44). Restore it to cx=36.
[face scene] The right blush slid left (cx=84). Restore it to cx=92.
[cart scene] Left wheel rolled down-left (cx=44, cy=114). Restore to cx=52, cy=110.
[cart scene] Right wheel rolled down-right (cx=100, cy=114). Restore to cx=92, cy=110.
[house scene] Strip the house back to its essentials. Keep ONLY door and window (drop chimney + doorknob). The home outline (base) always stays.
[clock scene] Strip the clock: keep ONLY the minute-hand (drop hour-hand and pivot). The clock outline always stays.
[envelope scene] Strip the envelope: keep ONLY the address line (drop stamp and urgent). Envelope outline stays.
[bell scene] Strip the bell: keep ONLY the ringer (drop badge and badge-count). Bell outline stays.
[face scene] Wipe the tear: keep ONLY blush-left and blush-right. Tear-left is dropped. Face outline stays.
[cart scene] Empty the cart: keep ONLY both wheels (drop item-1 and item-2). Cart outline stays.
[pin scene] Drop the shadow: keep ONLY pin-dot. Map-pin outline stays.
[gift scene] Tighten the bow: keep ONLY bow-knot (drop bow-left and bow-right). Gift outline stays.
[bulb scene] Dim the bulb: keep ONLY filament (drop halo). Bulb outline stays.
[cog scene] Strip the cog: keep ONLY center-dot (drop rotation-arrow). Cog outline stays.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (home, heart, star, sun, moon, cloud). Recolor ONLY the home to #e63946. The other five must remain at #222.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (bell, envelope, phone, microphone, cog, user). Bolden ONLY the microphone to stroke-width 3. The other five must remain at the default 1.5.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (shopping-cart, gift, tag, truck, key, lock-closed). Recolor ONLY the shopping-cart to #22c55e. The other five must remain at #222.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (document, folder, bookmark, trash, magnifying-glass, globe-alt). Bolden ONLY the trash to stroke-width 3. The other five must remain at the default 1.5.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (chart-bar, chart-pie, clock, calendar, camera, photo). Recolor ONLY the chart-bar to #a855f7. The other five must remain at #222.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (home, heart, star, sun, moon, cloud). Bolden ONLY the sun to stroke-width 3. The other five must remain at the default 1.5.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (bell, envelope, phone, microphone, cog, user). Recolor ONLY the bell to #3b82f6. The other five must remain at #222.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (shopping-cart, gift, tag, truck, key, lock-closed). Bolden ONLY the truck to stroke-width 3. The other five must remain at the default 1.5.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (document, folder, bookmark, trash, magnifying-glass, globe-alt). Recolor ONLY the document to #fde047. The other five must remain at #222.
Six icons in a 3×2 grid (chart-bar, chart-pie, clock, calendar, camera, photo). Bolden ONLY the calendar to stroke-width 3. The other five must remain at the default 1.5.
[house scene] Add a fence post next to the house: rect x=20, y=100, w=2, h=12, fill #92400e.
[house scene] Add smoke above the chimney: ellipse cx=88, cy=18, rx=5, ry=3, fill #9ca3af.
[clock scene] Add a second-hand: line (64,64)→(64,28), stroke #e63946, stroke-width 1.
